title: Fix path resolution for portable installation
description: Fix the foundational blocker: all skills, hooks, and pipeline docs that reference cli/templates/, .claude/hooks/, or .claude/skills/ relative to CWD must resolve correctly when gruai is installed as npm package. Add hooks to package.json files array. Create .gruai/ as canonical home with symlinks to platform-specific dirs. Replace hardcoded path assumptions with package-relative resolution.

dod.criterion: package.json files array includes .claude/hooks/ and all 5 validation scripts appear in npm pack --dry-run output
Skills and pipeline docs resolve package-bundled file paths correctly both when installed via npm and when running from source
gruai-config copies hooks to consumer .claude/hooks/ during setup/update

tasks.title: Add .claude/hooks/ to package.json files array
tasks.user_scenario: When a consumer installs gru-ai via npm, the 5 validation hook scripts are included in the package and available on disk.
tasks.scope: Add '.claude/hooks/' to the files array in package.json so that validate-cast.sh, validate-project-json.sh, validate-reviews.sh, validate-gate.sh, and detect-stale-docs.sh are published with the npm package. Verify with npm pack --dry-run that all 5 scripts appear in the tarball listing.

dod.criterion: Running 'npm pack --dry-run 2>&1' lists all 5 hook scripts (validate-cast.sh, validate-project-json.sh, validate-reviews.sh, validate-gate.sh, detect-stale-docs.sh)
npm run type-check passes without errors
No other entries in files array were removed or modified

tasks.title: Create gruai package path resolution utility
tasks.user_scenario: Skills and pipeline docs can resolve paths to package-bundled files (templates, hooks) regardless of whether gruai is running from source or as an installed npm package.
tasks.scope: Create a shell-based resolution approach: a small helper script (e.g., cli/resolve-pkg-root.sh) that finds the gruai package root by walking up from its own location using dirname/realpath. Update SKILL.md files for gruai-agents and gruai-config to instruct agents to resolve cli/templates/ paths relative to the gruai package root rather than assuming CWD.

dod.criterion: A documented resolution mechanism exists that reliably finds the gruai package root from a consumer project (works for both npm-installed and local development)
gruai-agents SKILL.md instructions reference the resolution mechanism instead of bare 'cli/templates/' paths
gruai-config SKILL.md instructions reference the resolution mechanism instead of bare 'cli/templates/' paths
The resolution approach handles the case where gruai is linked locally (npm link) vs installed normally

tasks.title: Fix .claude/hooks/ path references in pipeline docs
tasks.user_scenario: When the pipeline runs in a consumer project, hook invocations in pipeline docs resolve to the correct hook scripts from the gruai package rather than failing with 'file not found'.
tasks.scope: Update the 3 pipeline docs (05-planning.md, 09-execute-projects.md, 10-wrapup.md) that invoke .claude/hooks/ scripts. Update the invocation instructions to use the package path resolution mechanism from the previous task.

dod.criterion: All 5 hook invocations across 05-planning.md, 09-execute-projects.md, and 10-wrapup.md use the package-root resolution mechanism instead of bare '.claude/hooks/' paths
The relative link in 05-planning.md pointing to validate-cast.sh is updated to use the resolved path
Hook invocations still work in the development repo (agent-conductor itself) where hooks are at .claude/hooks/ relative to repo root
No other content in the pipeline docs was modified beyond the path references

tasks.title: Extend gruai-config skill to copy hooks to consumer .claude/hooks/
tasks.user_scenario: When a user runs /gruai-config to update their project, hooks are copied to .claude/hooks/ alongside skills, so the pipeline can invoke them directly without npm path resolution.
tasks.scope: Update gruai-config SKILL.md Step 3 to also copy .claude/hooks/*.sh from the gruai package to the consumer's .claude/hooks/ directory. If this copy-to-consumer approach is adopted, simplify the pipeline doc references from task 3 to use .claude/hooks/ directly.

dod.criterion: gruai-config SKILL.md Step 3 includes instructions to copy all .sh files from package .claude/hooks/ to consumer .claude/hooks/
The 'What It Does NOT Overwrite' or a new 'What It DOES Overwrite' section explicitly lists hooks as framework files that get updated
The backup step (Step 2) includes .claude/hooks/ in the backup alongside .claude/skills/
If the copy-to-consumer approach makes task 3's resolution changes redundant, the pipeline docs are simplified back to .claude/hooks/ direct references
